zh.title: 梦幻时代预言全集 - 澳洲原住民万年智慧中的生态警示与未来启示 | Aboriginal Dreamtime
zh.description: 澳洲原住民梦幻时代（Tjukurpa/Jukurrpa）口传传统中的14条生态智慧与预言性警示，涵盖彩虹蛇传说、火焰管理、水循环、大地照护、歌之路等主题。万年智慧对当代环境危机的深刻启示。
zh.keywords: 梦幻时代,澳洲原住民,Dreamtime,Tjukurpa,彩虹蛇,原住民预言,生态智慧,歌之路,大地照护,Aboriginal prophecy
zh.ogTitle: 梦幻时代预言全集 | Aboriginal Dreamtime Prophecies
zh.ogDescription: 澳洲原住民梦幻时代口传传统中的生态智慧与预言性警示。万年智慧对现代文明的深刻启示。
zh.twitterDescription: 14条澳洲原住民梦幻时代生态智慧与预言性警示，涵盖彩虹蛇、火焰管理、歌之路等万年口传传统。

en.title: Aboriginal Dreamtime Prophecies - 10,000+ Years of Indigenous Ecological Wisdom & Warnings | Full Archive
en.description: 14 prophetic teachings from Australian Aboriginal Dreamtime (Tjukurpa/Jukurrpa) oral traditions, covering Rainbow Serpent warnings, fire management, water cycles, care for Country, and songlines. Ancient wisdom with profound relevance to modern environmental crisis.
en.keywords: Dreamtime,Aboriginal prophecy,Tjukurpa,Jukurrpa,Rainbow Serpent,indigenous wisdom,ecological prophecy,songlines,care for Country,Australian Aboriginal
en.ogTitle: Aboriginal Dreamtime Prophecies - Ancient Ecological Wisdom
en.ogDescription: Prophetic teachings from 10,000+ years of Australian Aboriginal oral tradition. Rainbow Serpent warnings, fire management wisdom, and ecological teachings with modern relevance.
en.twitterDescription: 14 prophetic teachings from Aboriginal Dreamtime oral traditions spanning 10,000+ years. Ancient ecological wisdom with startling modern relevance.
